blocks.text: Real Madrid Host Getafe as Title Race Stays Razor-Tight

Monday night belongs to La Liga — Real Madrid must keep pace in a title race where every dropped point matters. Meanwhile, Tuesday's football calendar explodes with six fixtures across three competitions, headlined by a Copa del Rey miracle mission.
⚽ Real Madrid vs Getafe — Los Blancos need three points to stay in touch at the top. 21:00

Norwegian angle: Viktor Sørloth went goalless as Atlético held their La Liga ground midweek — Tuesday is his chance to change the narrative. And with Haaland sidelined, all eyes drift south to Premier League alternatives.
